chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1040 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.6688/2023 (C/A) 07.11.2023 Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Najaf Ali Janwri, Clerk of Municipal Committee, Khairpur has brought an original cheque bearing No.41600938 of Rs.3,00,000/- (Rupees three lac), which has been given to the petitioner. He further submits that an amount of Rs.7,31,688/- is outstanding, which will be paid to the petitioner in three equal monthly installments. In view of above, the listed application is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
